meta.siteTitle: How Much Cloud — Cloud Cost Comparison
meta.siteDescription: Compare estimated monthly costs for your workload across AWS, Azure, and GCP — side by side.
meta.instancesTitle: AWS vs Azure vs GCP Instance Price Comparison | How Much Cloud
meta.instancesDescription: Compare vCPU/RAM specs and hourly/monthly prices of AWS EC2, Azure VM, and GCP Compute Engine instances in one table. Linux on-demand list prices, Seoul and US East regions.
meta.methodologyTitle: Data Sources & Methodology | How Much Cloud
meta.methodologyDescription: How we collect prices from the official cloud pricing APIs, validate them daily, and compute estimates — including comparison rules and limitations.

home.title: Cloud cost comparison
home.subtitle: Enter the specs you need and compare estimated monthly costs across AWS · Azure · GCP side by side.

estimate.footnote: Linux on-demand list prices × 730 hours/month. Discounts and free tiers not included. The arrow (→) marks the cheapest instance that satisfies your specs, matched automatically. Storage compares general-purpose SSDs (gp3 · Premium SSD v2 · Balanced PD) and standard object tiers; traffic uses tiered internet-routing rates.

instances.title: Instance price comparison
instances.subtitle: {count, number} AWS · Azure · GCP instances — Linux on-demand list prices (USD).

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.description: Feature requests, problems, wrong data — we want to hear it all.
feedback.placeholder: e.g. Please add managed database (RDS etc.) comparison
